description: Utilities for managing translations and supporting multiple languages.

modules.name: i18n
modules.description: A simple i18n utility with a React hook for managing and displaying translated content.

prompts.title: Add New Language
prompts.description: Prompt to help AI add a new locale to the i18n configuration.
prompts.content: I want to add a new language to my i18n setup. Please provide the code to add '{locale}' with the following translations: {translations}. Use the createI18n function from the i18n module.

prompts.title: Translate Component
prompts.description: Prompt to help AI refactor a component to use i18n.
prompts.content: Please refactor the following React component to use the i18n module. Replace all hardcoded strings with the t() function from useTranslation(). Component: {component_code}

functions.name: createI18n
functions.description: Initializes the service with translations and a default locale. Call once at app startup.
params: config: { translations: Record<string, any>, defaultLocale: string }

functions.name: setLocale
functions.description: Changes the current language, triggering updates in components using the hook.

functions.name: getLocale
functions.description: Returns the currently active locale string.

functions.name: t
functions.description: Translates a key into the current language, with optional interpolation.

functions.name: useTranslation
functions.description: A React hook that provides the `t` function and current `locale`.
